[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 01001000 2
4 11001010 4
5 10001010 3
6 00110001 3
7 01110111 6

23 00000000 a match 0 1 2

67 00100000 1
70 00000100 1
